function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest design-partner-linked invoice from the workspace records.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was read earlier; only one attachment so newest-first rule satisfied; recipient matches canonical entity primary_contact_email; subject with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to review next inbound note and act on it. I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity against canonical entity record, found the design-partner-linked invoice via finance records, created an outbound email draft with the correct attachment, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness: request was for oldest 1 invoice; canonical search in invoices for design_partner returned exactly 1 file, so result set complete and oldest/newest equivalent with N=1. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing outbound draft.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested action. I verified the sender against the canonical entity record, identified the design-partner-linked invoice, created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached, and removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, applied inbox and sending-email workflows, used inbox frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox message requested a reply with the oldest 1 invoice linked to design partner. Sender 'miles@novak.example' matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Finance search and invoice read identified the design-partner-linked invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that attachment, then inbox item was deleted per workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read finance rules and searched invoices for design_partner
